description: Default error catalog template for project-local customization.

errors.name: UnknownError
errors.title: Unknown error
errors.message: An unknown error occurred.
errors.developerHint: Use this error only as a final fallback when no more specific definition fits.

errors.name: OperationFailed
errors.title: Operation failed
errors.message: The requested operation failed.
errors.developerHint: Prefer a more specific error when the failure reason is known.

errors.name: UnsupportedOperation
errors.title: Unsupported operation
errors.message: The requested operation is not supported in this context.
errors.developerHint: Check feature flags, platform capabilities, current state, or selected profile.

errors.name: FeatureNotImplemented
errors.title: Feature not implemented
errors.message: This feature is not implemented yet.
errors.developerHint: Use for planned features that are intentionally present in the API but not active yet.

errors.name: MissingConfigurationValue
errors.title: Missing configuration value
errors.message: A required configuration value is missing.
errors.developerHint: Check appsettings.json, environment variables, command-line options, or code-based configuration.

errors.name: InvalidConfigurationValue
errors.title: Invalid configuration value
errors.message: A configuration value is invalid.
errors.developerHint: Validate the configured value against the expected type, range, enum value, file path, or URI format.

errors.name: ConfigurationFileNotFound
errors.title: Configuration file not found
errors.message: The expected configuration file was not found.
errors.developerHint: Check the configured path and whether the file is copied to the output directory or mounted in the runtime environment.

errors.name: ConfigurationSectionMissing
errors.title: Configuration section missing
errors.message: A required configuration section is missing.
errors.developerHint: Check the expected section name and whether options binding points to the right configuration path.

errors.name: ConfigurationBindingFailed
errors.title: Configuration binding failed
errors.message: Configuration could not be bound to the expected options object.
errors.developerHint: Check property names, value types, nullable requirements, and custom converters.

errors.name: RequiredValueMissing
errors.title: Required value missing
errors.message: A required value is missing.
errors.developerHint: Use for input, command, request, options, or document fields that must be present.

errors.name: InvalidValue
errors.title: Invalid value
errors.message: A provided value is invalid.
errors.developerHint: Attach the field name and rejected value in runtime metadata when safe to do so.

errors.name: ValueOutOfRange
errors.title: Value out of range
errors.message: A provided value is outside the allowed range.
errors.developerHint: Attach minimum and maximum values in runtime metadata when available.

errors.name: InvalidFormat
errors.title: Invalid format
errors.message: A provided value has an invalid format.
errors.developerHint: Useful for invalid dates, numbers, codes, identifiers, JSON fragments, or URIs.

errors.name: DuplicateValue
errors.title: Duplicate value
errors.message: A value appears more than once where uniqueness is required.
errors.developerHint: Use for duplicate names, aliases, IDs, codes, tags, or user-provided collection items.

errors.name: UnknownReference
errors.title: Unknown reference
errors.message: A value references an item that is not known.
errors.developerHint: Use when a category, code group, owner, profile, ID, or foreign key reference cannot be resolved.

errors.name: FileNotFound
errors.title: File not found
errors.message: The requested file was not found.
errors.developerHint: Check the resolved absolute path and runtime working directory.

errors.name: DirectoryNotFound
errors.title: Directory not found
errors.message: The requested directory was not found.
errors.developerHint: Check whether bootstrap initialization has created the expected workspace folders.

errors.name: FileReadFailed
errors.title: File read failed
errors.message: The file could not be read.
errors.developerHint: Check permissions, file locks, encoding, path length, and whether the file is still present.

errors.name: FileWriteFailed
errors.title: File write failed
errors.message: The file could not be written.
errors.developerHint: Check permissions, available disk space, target folder existence, safe-write settings, and file locks.

errors.name: JsonsWorkspaceUnavailable
errors.title: JSON workspace unavailable
errors.message: The project-local JSON workspace is unavailable.
errors.developerHint: Check JsonsOptions.RootPath, directory permissions, application identity, and deployment layout.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.title: Unauthorized
errors.message: Authentication is required to access this resource.
errors.developerHint: For web profiles this usually maps to HTTP 401.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.title: Forbidden
errors.message: You do not have permission to access this resource.
errors.developerHint: For web profiles this usually maps to HTTP 403.

errors.name: AuthenticationFailed
errors.title: Authentication failed
errors.message: Authentication failed.
errors.developerHint: Avoid exposing sensitive authentication details in user-facing messages.

errors.name: TokenExpired
errors.title: Token expired
errors.message: The security token has expired.
errors.developerHint: Refresh the token or require the user to sign in again.

errors.name: NetworkUnavailable
errors.title: Network unavailable
errors.message: The network is unavailable.
errors.developerHint: Check connectivity, DNS, firewall, proxy, VPN, and host availability.

errors.name: HttpRequestFailed
errors.title: HTTP request failed
errors.message: The HTTP request failed.
errors.developerHint: Attach status code, method, endpoint name, correlation ID, and retry information when safe.

errors.name: RemoteTimeout
errors.title: Remote operation timed out
errors.message: The remote operation timed out.
errors.developerHint: Check timeout configuration, retry policy, remote service health, and network latency.

errors.name: DnsLookupFailed
errors.title: DNS lookup failed
errors.message: The host name could not be resolved.
errors.developerHint: Check DNS servers, split-DNS rules, search suffixes, VPN routes, and public/private zone configuration.

errors.name: DatabaseUnavailable
errors.title: Database unavailable
errors.message: The database is unavailable.
errors.developerHint: Check connection string, credentials, network reachability, server health, migrations, and pool exhaustion.

errors.name: DatabaseQueryFailed
errors.title: Database query failed
errors.message: A database query failed.
errors.developerHint: Attach query name, operation type, and provider-specific error code when safe. Do not expose raw SQL to users.

errors.name: EntityNotFound
errors.title: Entity not found
errors.message: The requested item was not found.
errors.developerHint: Use for missing records or aggregate roots. For web profiles this often maps to HTTP 404.

errors.name: ConcurrencyConflict
errors.title: Concurrency conflict
errors.message: The item was changed by another operation.
errors.developerHint: Reload the entity, merge changes, or ask the user to retry with the latest version.

errors.name: ExternalServiceUnavailable
errors.title: External service unavailable
errors.message: An external service is unavailable.
errors.developerHint: Attach endpoint name, provider name, retry policy, and fallback information when safe.

errors.name: ExternalServiceReturnedInvalidData
errors.title: External service returned invalid data
errors.message: An external service returned data that could not be used.
errors.developerHint: Store a sanitized response sample or schema mismatch summary in diagnostics, not in user-facing text.

errors.name: SerializationFailed
errors.title: Serialization failed
errors.message: The value could not be serialized.
errors.developerHint: Check unsupported types, cyclic references, converters, naming policy, and nullable values.

errors.name: DeserializationFailed
errors.title: Deserialization failed
errors.message: The value could not be deserialized.
errors.developerHint: Check JSON shape, property names, converters, required properties, and schema version.

errors.name: InvalidJsonDocument
errors.title: Invalid JSON document
errors.message: The JSON document is invalid.
errors.developerHint: Report the JSON path, line number, byte position, and schema version when available.
